title: Inventory Crab
description: This resource pack reworks the recipe button into a crab located on a small sand island with a palm tree in your inventory!
body:
## Inventory Crab
This resource pack reworks the recipe button into your very own crab. In its normal state, it has a simple animation with a recipe book. Hovering and/or clicking on it will remove the book. Additionally, the crab itself is on a small island with a palm tree and a cactus, but the flower and tree only appear in the player's inventory; in other menus, only the island appears.
